set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { endMs: now() as Number {unit: 'milliseconds'}, startMs: (now() - |PT5M|) as Number {unit: 'milliseconds'} }]

http:request.doc:name: CPU avg
http:request.http:query-params: #[{"start": vars.timeRange.startMs as String, "end": vars.timeRange.endMs as String, "duration": "PT5M"}]

http:request.doc:name: Mem avg
http:request.http:query-params: #[{"start": vars.timeRange.startMs as String, "end": vars.timeRange.endMs as String, "duration": "PT5M"}]

http:request.doc:name: Error count
http:request.http:query-params: #[{"start": vars.timeRange.startMs as String, "end": vars.timeRange.endMs as String, "duration": "PT5M"}]

set-variable.value: #[vars.envGwData ++ [{ name: vars.gw.name, id: vars.gw.id, status: vars.gw.status default 'UNKNOWN', cpu: vars.cpuVal, mem: vars.memVal, errors: vars.errVal }]]
